master_is_stable.symptom: The cluster has a stable master node

disk.symptom: The cluster has enough available disk space.

shards_capacity.symptom: The cluster has enough room to add new shards.

shards_availability.symptom: All primary and replica shards are available.

data_stream_lifecycle.symptom: Data streams are executing their lifecycles without issues

slm.symptom: No Snapshot Lifecycle Management policies configured
